text:
09/30/2024
658 GG0170C3_STTG_BED_SIDE_END_CD GG0170C3_STTG_BED_SIDE_END_CD Lying to Sitting at Side of Bed Ability at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to move from a lying to sitting position at the side of the bed at the end of the SNF
PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
